title: Follow the Leader
snippet: Follow the Leader Description One participant leaves the room or turns away while the remaining group secretly chooses a leader. Everyone stands in a circle, and the leader begins performing simple movements that the…

title: Hi, Ha, Ho
snippet: Hi, Ha, Ho Description Participants stand in a circle. One player points at another participant while saying "Hi!" . The selected participant immediately raises both hands and says "Ha!" . The participants standing…

title: Memory Chain
snippet: Memory Chain Description The first participant introduces themselves by saying their name together with a word, fact, phrase, or gesture. Each following participant repeats everything that came before in the correct…

title: Story Chain
snippet: Story Chain Description Participants collaboratively build a story. The first person starts with a short sentence (e.g., "I woke up." ). Each following participant repeats the entire story from the beginning before…

title: Name Toss
snippet: Name Toss Description Participants stand in a circle and throw a soft ball to one another, saying the receiver's name before throwing. Once everyone becomes familiar with the names, additional balls can be introduced to…

title: Attack & Dodge
snippet: Attack & Dodge Description Participants stand in a circle and take turns making one quick attack movement toward another player's hand, while the defender has one chance to dodge. Players freeze after each move, and…

title: Hand Slap
snippet: Hand Slap Description Participants stand in a circle with one hand extended. Players take turns attempting to quickly slap the hand of the person next to them while simultaneously avoiding having their own hand slapped.…

title: The Wind Blows
snippet: The Wind Blows Description Participants sit in a circle with one person standing in the middle. The person in the middle says, "The wind blows for everyone who..." followed by a characteristic (e.g., "...likes coffee,"…

title: Zombie Chair
snippet: Zombie Chair Description Participants sit in a circle with one empty chair. One participant acts as the Zombie and slowly walks toward the empty chair, attempting to sit down. The seated participants must prevent this…
